arts.ttl: Oliver Baumann: Who is the Hoffenheim goalkeeper and late-blooming Germany international?
arts.sum: Having been a dependable Bundseliga shotstopper for over a decade, Oliver Baumann capped his brilliant form for Hoffenheim by becoming Germany's first-choice goalkeeper at the age of 34. He made his Bundesliga debut in May 2010 in a 3-1 win against Borussia Dortmund, and became the first-choice goalkeeper at the Black Forest club from the following season.
